takeaways.title: Lots of specific critique (not general negativity)
takeaways.detail: Suggestions show up in 9% of comments (10 total), often focused on stakes, pacing, and what the movie is trying to be.

takeaways.title: Viewers want the framing
takeaways.detail: Questions make up 13% of comments (14 total), largely about the mockumentary format and missing cameos.

takeaways.title: Charli is the center of the discussion
takeaways.detail: Many comments directly reference Charli xcx; when summarizing feedback, separate movie-structure notes from artist/fandom notes.
